github-latest-release.description: Track GitHub /releases/latest (the 'Set as latest' pointer) for projects that publish mainline + stable both as prerelease=false. Opt in per-package via packageRules with datasource: custom.github-latest-release and packageName: <owner>/<repo>.

packageRules.description: Use semver-coerced versioning for all sources
Ignore v-prefixed legacy tags in agentgateway chart registry

Coder: track GitHub /releases/latest (stable channel pointer). Coder marks both mainline and stable as prerelease=false on GitHub, so the docker datasource's 'highest semver wins' picks mainline. Swap to the GitHub stable signal. Floor of 2.32.0 prevents a downgrade PR while cluster is on mainline 2.32.x; once 2.32 promotes to stable (~when 2.33 GAs), /releases/latest will return 2.32.x and the floor becomes harmless.
